sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66874" key="metaplastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετα-πλαστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n66874.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">changed in form</tr_>, of forms used by Poets, Festus<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:p.138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.138</biblScope> </bibl> L.</sense> </entryFree>
